name: deployer_checker
description: Reputation check for token creators. Analyzes a deployer wallet's history of token creation, tracks confirmed rugpulls/abandoned projects, and calculates a 0-100 trust score. Ideal for identifying serial scammers and verifying project legitimacy before investing. Currently supports Base, Ethereum, and BSC.

address.description: The deployer wallet address (0x format) to scan.

chain.description: Chain name: base, ethereum, bsc. Defaults to base.
